nonGoals: Do not change validate.ts KNOWN_TAGS behaviour (case-sensitive XML validation warnings are out of scope)
Do not modify any other file
Do not change the SSML_TAGS constant
objective: Make getTagDef() case-insensitive so that uppercase, mixed-case, and lowercase tag lookups all resolve correctly. Add corresponding vitest cases covering uppercase, mixed-case, lowercase, nonexistent, and cross-provider parity.
planText:
1. In apps/web/src/lib/ssml/tags.ts, change line ~252 from `SSML_TAGS.find((t) => t.tag === tagName);` to `SSML_TAGS.find((t) => t.tag === tagName.toLowerCase());`.
2. In apps/web/src/lib/ssml/tags.test.ts, add six new test cases inside the existing `getTagDef` and `isTagSupportedByProvider` describe blocks:
   - `getTagDef('PROSODY')` returns the prosody definition (`.tag === 'prosody'`)
   - `getTagDef('Break')` returns the break definition (`.tag === 'break'`)
   - `getTagDef('emphasis')` still returns the emphasis definition (lowercase parity)
   - `getTagDef('EmPhAsIs')` returns the emphasis definition (mixed-case)
   - `getTagDef('NONEXISTENT')` returns undefined (uppercase unknown)
   - `isTagSupportedByProvider('PROSODY', 'aws-polly') === isTagSupportedByProvider('prosody', 'aws-polly')` (both true, cross-provider parity)
3. Run `npm run test` — all existing and new tests must pass.
